title: EDPB work programme 2026-2027: easing compliance and strengthening cooperation across the evolving digital landscape
summary: Brussels, 12 February - During its latest plenary, the EDPB adopted its work programme for 2026-2027. This is the second work programme to support the implementation of the EDPB strategy 2024-2027*. The work programme is based on the priorities set out in the EDPB strategy and the needs identified a...
